CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2023 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgmnt
Off Calendar Apr-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Defendant's unopposed motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f)(4) is granted and judgment shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and Feb/Mar 2023 Consent Judgment.

Order and Consent judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
